steps.title: Substitute x = 5 into the function
steps.content: We have $f(x) = 3x + b$. Using the condition $f(5) = 4$, substitute $x = 5$: $$f(5) = 3(5) + b = 15 + b$$

steps.title: Solve the equation for b
steps.content: Since $f(5) = 4$, we have: $$15 + b = 4$$ Subtract 15 from both sides: $$b = 4 - 15 = -11$$
